operation.add: <a {% if oct_ultrastore_data.product_gallery is not defined %}href="{{ thumb }}" onclick="funcyFirst(); return false;"{% else %}href="javascript:;"{% endif %} class="oct-gallery">

operation.search: <a class="additional-gallery-item{% if key == 0 %} active{% endif %}" href="javascript:;" data-href="{{ image.popup }}">
operation.add: <a class="additional-gallery-item{% if key == 0 %} active{% endif %}" data-fancybox="images" {% if oct_ultrastore_data.product_gallery is not defined %}href="{{ image.popup }}"{% else %}href="javascript:;"{% endif %} data-href="{{ image.popup }}">
